metadata.required_stack: bun, node, zig (phase-1 and later), tsgo/tsc

checks.name: Repository is writable by harness
checks.description: Foundation check used by all automated runs.

checks.name: Required toolchain presence (bun, rg, git)
checks.description: Hard requirement before starting any code changes.

checks.name: Core workspace files exist
checks.command: test -f README.md && test -f package.json && test -f build.zig && test -f .agent-harness/run.ts

checks.name: Submodules are declared and present
checks.command: test -f .gitmodules && rg -q 'third_party/libghostty/ghostty' .gitmodules && rg -q 'third_party/zmx' .gitmodules && test -d third_party/libghostty && test -d third_party/libghostty/ghostty && test -d third_party/zmx
checks.description: Fail quickly if required third-party repositories are not checked out before build steps.

checks.name: Zig available
checks.description: Required starting from Phase 1, tracked as warning until installed.

checks.name: Build entrypoint file is well-formed
checks.command: test -f src/main.zig && test -f src/session_manager.zig && test -f src/session_backends.zig && test -f src/ws_frames.zig

checks.name: Libghosty patch workflow scripts exist
checks.description: Ensure deterministic submodule patch workflow can be run when needed.

checks.name: Libghosty patch artifacts exist
checks.description: Track overlay patch metadata and baseline for deterministic updates.

checks.name: Web package lint is clean
checks.description: Warning-level hygiene checks while source is still stabilizing.

checks.name: Unit test layer passes
checks.description: Fast helper coverage for Zig and TypeScript.

checks.name: Frontend/Server contract smoke entrypoint
checks.command: test -f web/src/main.ts && test -f web/src/session.ts && test -f web/src/terminal-client.ts && rg -q "api/sessions/.*/ws|buildSessionWebSocketUrl|decodeTerminalMessage" web/src && rg -q "fit.fit|onResize|onData" web/src/terminal-client.ts

checks.name: Integration test layer passes
checks.description: Live server behavior with the local backend.

checks.name: Data contract test layer passes
checks.description: Exact JSON contract assertions for session metadata and share grants.

checks.name: zmx protocol reference files discovered
checks.command: if [ -d third_party/zmx/src ] && [ -f third_party/zmx/src/ipc.zig ] && [ -f third_party/zmx/src/socket.zig ]; then exit 0; elif [ -d ../../neurosnap/zmx/src ] && [ -f ../../neurosnap/zmx/src/ipc.zig ] && [ -f ../../neurosnap/zmx/src/socket.zig ]; then exit 0; elif [ -d ../neurosnap/zmx/src ] && [ -f ../neurosnap/zmx/src/ipc.zig ] && [ -f ../neurosnap/zmx/src/socket.zig ]; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi
checks.description: Phase 3 is integration-ready once client/daiemon glue is implemented.

checks.name: zmx patch workflow scripts exist
checks.description: Ensure deterministic zmx submodule patch workflow can be run when needed.

checks.name: zmx patch artifacts exist
checks.description: Track zmx overlay patch metadata and baseline for deterministic updates.

checks.name: zmx backend smoke test
checks.description: Build vendored zmx, boot server in zmx mode, and verify a live WebSocket terminal round-trip.

checks.name: End-to-end test layer passes
checks.description: zmx-backed end-to-end test coverage via the shared test harness.

checks.name: Single-binary artifact pipeline check
checks.description: Foundation check for embed bundle readiness.

checks.name: Swift integration abstraction entrypoint
checks.description: Swift host can inject a custom backend provider, authorization policy, and share grant issuer.

checks.name: Tree-sitter AST tooling is present
checks.command: test -f scripts/tree-sitter.sh && test -f tools/tree-sitter/queries/zig/functions.scm && test -f tools/tree-sitter/queries/typescript/functions.scm && bun run ast:scan >/dev/null
checks.description: Maintainability tooling should be able to inspect Zig and TypeScript ASTs deterministically.
